clusters.label: Focused Speedster
clusters.description: This group exhibits highly linear and rapid navigation with minimal exploration, focusing strictly on completing the checkout process quickly.

clusters.label: Erratic Scanner
clusters.description: This persona exhibits rapid, non-linear navigation with repetitive cycles and vertical oscillation, often revisiting the same sections without clear progression.

clusters.label: Erratic Clicker
clusters.description: Exhibits scattered and repetitive navigation patterns with frequent backtracking and reloading.

clusters.label: Cautious Explorer
clusters.description: Users who exhibit hesitant, non-linear navigation with repetitive validation clicks, often revisiting elements before proceeding.

clusters.label: Frustrated Clicker
clusters.description: This persona exhibits erratic, non-linear navigation with repetitive and rapid clicks, often indicating frustration or confusion.
